locations.name: 托海
locations.summary: 托喀依（维吾尔老文字：توقاي‎，拉丁维吾尔文：toqay，拼音字母：tok̂ay；尉犁维吾尔语及柯尔克孜语称托阔依 توقوي tok̂oy，尉犁音：[tʰoqʰo̞j]），作为沙漠绿色走廊是一种主要分布于内流河湾处的乔、灌、草及胡杨…

relations.subject: Vermilion flycatcher
relations.evidence: North American populations generally migrate by late August and return between February and April. Their ability to migrate likely aided their wide colonization of the Americas. Vermilion flycatchers prefer somewhat open areas and are found in trees or shrubs in savanna, scrub, agricultural areas, riparian woodlands, and desert as well, but usually near water. relations.subject: Vermilion flycatcher
relations.evidence: Populations have declined because of habitat loss, though the species remains abundant
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
